hero.title: Eyes on Cameroon
hero.subtitle: The bridge between Germany and Cameroon

about.title: Who are we?
about.description: Eyes on Cameroon is a non-profit organization dedicated to education, culture and exchange between Germany and Cameroon.
about.mission_text: We promote dialogue between the two countries and support projects that improve the lives of people in Cameroon.
